api_key.saved_to_secret_storage: NexusCode: API key saved to SecretStorage.

build_healer.compiler_passed: ✅ Global Compiler Passed! The app is structurally sound.
build_healer.no_safe_patch: ⚠️ Build-Healer could not determine a safe patch. Manual intervention required.

buttons.auto_run_tests: Auto-Generate & Run Tests for the currently open file
buttons.tdd_master_suite: Generate Master TDD Suite (Markdown Plan + Code) in /nexuscode

input.placeholder: Ask a question or request a build...

chat.compacted_summary: Context compacted (older messages summarized to save tokens)

empty.hint: Describe a feature, paste an error, or ask about your codebase. NexusCode will plan the change, write it across files, and run the verifier — you review the diff.
empty.title: Plan, code, verify.

commands.highlight_code_to_review: Please highlight some code to review.
commands.open_sidebar_first: Please open the NexusCode sidebar first.

hooks.no_hooks_defined: NexusCode: no hooks defined yet. Create .nexus/hooks/<n>.md to add one.
hooks.title: Hooks
hooks.empty_hint: Hooks fire prompts on file saves, commands, or schedules. Create a markdown file at .nexus/hooks/<name>.md to add one.

meta_context.restore_failed: CRITICAL: Restore failed. You may need to manually fix the source.
meta_context.restored_from_backup: Safety Guardrail: Source code restored from backup.

onboarding.save_key_prompt: To use Enterprise features, please securely store your API Key.

project.describe_idea: Describe your app idea. Attach API docs or reference files to enforce exact payloads.

security.access_denied_swarm: 🛡️ Nexus Security: Access Denied. Please log in to use the Swarm.
security.firewall_blocked: 🚨 Nexus Security Firewall BLOCKED a malicious command: {{command}}

steering.title: Steering rules
steering.empty_hint: Steering rules guide the agent across every task. Create one of the canonical files (product, structure, tech) or add your own .md file in .nexus/steering/.

terminal.self_evolution_failed: Self-Evolution Failed: Compilation Error. Check Output for details.

tests.all_passed: All tests passed on the first try!
tests.auto_heal_parse_failed: Auto-heal failed to parse LLM output.
tests.auto_heal_still_failing: Auto-Heal attempted, but tests still failing.
tests.generation_failed: Failed to generate or run tests.

traceability.matrix_computing: The graph currently shows physical files. Semantic AI links are being calculated in the background and will appear here shortly.
traceability.subheader: Click a 3D Node to view its structural text data.

transactions.atomic_committed: Atomic Transaction Committed with AI Metadata.

ui_evolution.evolution_applied: 🧬 Evolution Applied. Reload window to see changes.

undo.no_history: No undo history found for this task.

workspace.no_folder_open: Please open a workspace folder first.

bash_approval.allow_always_tooltip: Allow all bash commands for this task. Resets at the next user message.
bash_approval.body: The agent wants to run a shell command. It has passed the static denylist and the LLM Security Monitor; your approval is the final gate.
bash_approval.title: Approve command?

security_banner.body: The Security Monitor model is not responding, so commands are being blocked by default. Retry once your model is back, switch to a different model in Settings, or disable the gate for this session.
security_banner.confirm_disable: Disable the security gate for this session? Commands the agent runs will execute without the LLM safety check until you reload VS Code.
security_banner.title: Security gate offline

security_strip.denylist_tooltip: Static regex denylist runs before the LLM judge. Catches rm -rf /, fork bombs, curl|sh patterns.
security_strip.monitor_tooltip: LLM Security Monitor reviews every bash_exec command before user confirmation.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.chain_broken_warning: Hash chain integrity check failed. Investigate the on-disk log immediately.
audit.empty_hint: When the agent runs tools, edits files, or invokes the LLM, those events appear here. The on-disk log at .nexus/audit/ records everything for compliance.

specs.ears_explanation: EARS (Easy Approach to Requirements Syntax) is a structured pattern for writing testable requirements. Keywords stay UPPERCASE ENGLISH in every locale to anchor grep + tooling.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.empty_hint: Add server entries to .nexus/mcp-servers.json to extend the agent with external tools.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.copy_bundle_tooltip: Copy full session bundle as JSON for support tickets
